Package recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4

package recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.

Currently, these transformations are under development and quite buggy.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    recoder.kit.transformation
    This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    EnhancedFor2For
    converts an enhanced for loop to an "old style" for loop.
    MakeConditionalCompatible
    Deals with uses of the conditional(c-like trinary) operator which create intersection types.
    RemoveAnnotations
    Deals with annotations.
    RemoveCoVariantReturnTypes
    This transformation does not work yet!
    RemoveStaticImports
    Removes static imports from a given Compilation Unit and adds qualfication prefixes to (possible) uses of such imports.
    ReplaceEnums
    untested for enum declarations nested within enum declarations
    ReplaceEnums.ReplaceSingleEnum
     
    ResolveBoxing
    traverses a (sub)tree and replaces (un-)boxing conversions with explicit conversions.
    ResolveGenerics
    This transformation does not work yet!
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveGenericMethod
     
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveMethodReturnType
     
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveSingleGenericType
     
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveSingleVariableDeclaration
     
    ResolveVarArgs
    Replaces references to var arg methods and var arg methods itself to make it java 1.4 compliant.
